title: `ActionsDAG` nodes should contain only `ColumnConst` or `ColumnSet` as column
description:
The title should be true all the time, but we add columns in all places to the DAG with incorrect types.
Examples:
- https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/blob/7a34f3e2c3f354da1c6bce74e4de686ffa69829b/src/Interpreters/ActionsDAG.cpp#L470
- https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/blob/7a34f3e2c3f354da1c6bce74e4de686ffa69829b/src/Processors/QueryPlan/CubeStep.cpp#L55
- https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/blob/7a34f3e2c3f354da1c6bce74e4de686ffa69829b/src/Processors/QueryPlan/PartsSplitter.cpp#L1091
And a lot of other places.
This discovered by a regression present in 25.9 and 25.10 at the time of writing.
Repro:
- [25.8](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/51fa5e52-dccc-420a-a75d-30acb048c7e0) works
- [25.9](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/b3816462-d0be-48ab-8e1e-42f891bc0104) doesn't work
- [25.10](https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/a70c1f12-90ce-4b87-b75f-2225ac40a51f) doesn't work
The query used
```
CREATE TABLE test
(
`key` UInt64,
`value` Int64
)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY key;
INSERT INTO test SELECT cityHash64(number) AS key, number AS value FROM numbers(100);
EXPLAIN PLAN
WITH
view_1 AS
(
SELECT
key,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY key) AS rn
FROM test
),
view_2 AS
(
SELECT
key,
count() > 0 AS has_any
FROM test
GROUP BY
key
),
events AS
(
SELECT
*
FROM view_1 AS v1
INNER JOIN view_2 AS v2_1 USING (key)
LEFT JOIN view_2 AS v2_2 USING (key)
WHERE v1.rn = 1
)
SELECT count()
FROM events
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id BIGINT, name VARCHAR(255), value INT);
CREATE TABLE test2 (key BIGINT, score FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test2 SELECT id, value FROM test1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.name, t2.score FROM test1 AS t1 LEFT JOIN test2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.key WHERE t1.value > 5;
